_cssMapping: JSON camelCase keys map to CSS --dr-kebab-case. Note: craterLight → --dr-crater-lt (abbreviated), grainHover → --dr-grain-hover, amberHot → --dr-amber-hot

display.use: Hero elements, brand identity, section heroes

heading.use: Patient names, track titles, card headers

body.use: Clinical descriptions, UI labels, explanatory text

mono.use: Lab values, ISRC codes, JSON, timestamps, vitals

oledScience.rationale: Both void (#120C06) and obsidian (#160E08) keep OLED pixels energized above power-off threshold, eliminating purple-smearing artifacts during high-speed scrolling

songExpanse.chromeTokens: AppTheme (void, obsidian, grain, crater, amber, teal)
songExpanse.separation: Theme provides chrome/UI shell. TextColors provide content areas. Never conflate.
